_note: Router-confidence calibration battery for valuein_homepage. Distribution-based: recalibrate runs each query and derives strong/weak percentiles plus the cosine_anchor median — no relevance labels needed, so keep these REPRESENTATIVE of real exploratory usage (domain language a vibe coder actually types), not cherry-picked easy hits. Re-run after major index changes: hybrid-search-mcp recalibrate --cwd <valuein> --project valuein_homepage --gold benchmarks/router_calibration/valuein_gold.json
